meaning: n.男子服饰经销商,缝纫用品商人
examples: HABERDASHER. Here is the cap your worship did bespeak.
The haberdasher presented a cap, saying, "Here is the cap your worship bespoke. ""
Long ago, a young farmer and haberdasher from Missouri followed an unlikely path to the vice presidency.
Belk Department Stores has been the haberdasher of choice for many in North Carolina since its founding by WH Belk in 1888.
